quicksight.topic.namedentitydefinitionme: A structure that represents a metric.

quicksight.topic.namedentitydefinitionme.Description: The aggregation of a named entity. Valid values for this structure are `SUM`, `MIN`, `MAX`, `COUNT`, `AVERAGE`, `DISTINCT_COUNT`, `STDEV`, `STDEVP`, `VAR`, `VARP`, `PERCENTILE`, `MEDIAN`, and `CUSTOM`.
quicksight.topic.namedentitydefinitionme.Allowed values: AVERAGE | COUNT | CUSTOM | DISTINCT_COUNT | MAX | MEDIAN | MIN | PERCENTILE | STDEV | STDEVP | SUM | VAR | VARP

quicksight.topic.namedentitydefinitionme.Description: The additional parameters for an aggregation function.
